channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1970] 1.8.8<->2.3 Test failure on test suite sanity, subtest test_52c
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/5d044b80-febe-11e1-a707-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_52c failed with the following error:

chattr failed

== sanity test 52c: immutable flag test for client < 1.4.7 ========= 18:06:00 (1347584760)
mkdir: cannot create directory `/mnt/lustre/d52c': Input/output error
touch: cannot touch `/mnt/lustre/d52c/foo': No such file or directory
fail_loc=0x802
chattr: No such file or directory while trying to stat /mnt/lustre/d52c/foo
 sanity test_52c: @@@@@@ FAIL:  
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-09-13/lustre-b2_3-b1_8-el6-x86_64__18__-7f2ef88cb5a8/sanity.test_52c.*.1347584761.log
CMD: client-27vm1,client-27vm2.lab.whamcloud.com,client-27vm7,client-27vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2012-09-13/lustre-b2_3-b1_8-el6-x86_64__18__-7f2ef88cb5a8/sanity.test_52c.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1347584761.log;
         dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2012-09-13/lustre-b2_3-b1_8-el6-x86_64__18__-7f2ef88cb5a8/sanity.test_52c.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1347584761.log
lsattr: No such file or directory while trying to stat /mnt/lustre/d52c/foo
 sanity test_52c: @@@@@@ FAIL: lsattr failed 
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-09-13/lustre-b2_3-b1_8-el6-x86_64__18__-7f2ef88cb5a8/sanity.test_52c.*.1347584764.log
CMD: client-27vm1,client-27vm2.lab.whamcloud.com,client-27vm7,client-27vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2012-09-13/lustre-b2_3-b1_8-el6-x86_64__18__-7f2ef88cb5a8/sanity.test_52c.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1347584764.log;
         dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2012-09-13/lustre-b2_3-b1_8-el6-x86_64__18__-7f2ef88cb5a8/sanity.test_52c.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1347584764.log
chattr: No such file or directory while trying to stat /mnt/lustre/d52c/foo
 sanity test_52c: @@@@@@ FAIL: chattr failed 
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2012-09-13/lustre-b2_3-b1_8-el6-x86_64__18__-7f2ef88cb5a8/sanity.test_52c.*.1347584765.log
CMD: client-27vm1,client-27vm2.lab.whamcloud.com,client-27vm7,client-27vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2012-09-13/lustre-b2_3-b1_8-el6-x86_64__18__-7f2ef88cb5a8/sanity.test_52c.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1347584765.log;
         dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2012-09-13/lustre-b2_3-b1_8-el6-x86_64__18__-7f2ef88cb5a8/sanity.test_52c.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1347584765.log
Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...CMD: client-27vm1,client-27vm2.lab.whamcloud.com,client-27vm7,client-27vm8 lctl set_param -n fail_loc=0 2>/dev/null || true
done.
CMD: client-27vm1,client-27vm7,client-27vm8 rc=\$([ -f /proc/sys/lnet/catastrophe ] && echo \$(< /proc/sys/lnet/catastrophe) || echo 0);
if [ \$rc -ne 0 ]; then echo \$(hostname): \$rc; fi
exit \$rc;
item.summary: 1.8.8<->2.3 Test failure on test suite sanity, subtest test_52c

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
